content.en:
Rumble!!!!

The last immeasurable bone was condensed by Ye Tian, and at this time, he vaguely felt that the immeasurable bone in his whole body was about to undergo some subtle changes, but it was still a little short.

"It seems that we still have to temper the last immeasurable bone to the limit!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he took out some Hailou Heavenly Gold and began to refine his last immeasurable bone.

As time passed, this last immeasurable bone was tempered to become stronger and stronger.

In the end, the last immeasurable bone was also thoroughly tempered to the limit by Ye Tian.

At the moment when the refining reached the limit, the three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones in Ye Tian's body echoed each other, producing some kind of special attraction, releasing a silvery-white light that turned his body into a silver cocoon.

After a long time, the silver cocoon on Ye Tian's body shattered, and a body that was perfect to the limit walked out of it.

And at this moment, Ye Tian's physical body was nearly twice as powerful as before.

"I didn't expect that there would be such a benefit in refining the immeasurable bones of the whole body to the limit, and the physical body was directly doubled, which is double the original limit!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Not only that, but he also felt that there was a mysterious power in the depths of his body.

This power is similar to the origin power of supernatural powers, but it has not yet taken shape, it is just a sigil seed.

"Could it be the seed of the immeasurable supernatural technique?"

Ye Tian had a guess in his heart.

Of course, even if it is the seed of the Infinite Divine Power Technique, it is currently impossible to derive the true Infinite Divine Power Technique, and it will only be necessary to wait for him to advance to the fifth stage of the high-level Infinite Divine Power Technique.

Of course, if the seed of the Immeasurable Divine Power is formed, it will be much easier to impact the fifth stage in the future, but before that, there will be no special effects.

"This should be a kind of secret, I wonder if those top forces know about it?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, even if they knew, it would be impossible for them to say it, otherwise the value of the treasure of Hailou Tianjin would become even higher, which would not be conducive to the acquisition of those top forces.

Moreover, even if it is a top force, it is difficult to cultivate a great ancestor whose whole body has been tempered to the limit of immeasurable bones, so Ye Tian can fuse Hailou Jin to form Hailou Tianjin, so he dares to do so.

Besides, there are countless Great Ancestors in the Xuanqi Realm, and there are only a few who can finally become the fourth stage, let alone attack the fifth stage.

Therefore, even if the immeasurable bones of the whole body are tempered to the limit in the second stage, it is not of much significance.

After all, for those big forces, with this resource, it is better to use it separately to cultivate tens, hundreds, or even thousands of genius ancestors, there is no need to concentrate on one great ancestor, and the benefits obtained are not proportional, it is completely meaningless.

Subsequently, Ye Tian spent some more years cultivating to the limit of completely stabilizing at the Infinite Bone Stage.

Next, he began to condense immeasurable blood.

With Ye Tian's current background, even if he didn't use Hailou Tianjin, he was sure to condense the first drop of immeasurable blood.

However, it is natural to use Hailou Tianjin, after all, it is easier to break through with Hailou Tianjin, and the immeasurable blood condensed is more perfect.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian used a large amount of Hailou Heavenly Gold to start impacting the third stage, condensing the first drop of immeasurable blood.

For Ye Tian, there was no difficulty at all in impacting the third stage, and the whole process was very smooth.

Rumble!!!!

With the convergence of massive energy, the first drop of immeasurable blood finally condensed inside Ye Tian's body.

The birth of this drop of immeasurable blood exuded an incomparably terrifying aura, which was enough to make it difficult for even the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the second stage to stand.

However, soon after, the second drop of immeasurable blood and the third drop of immeasurable blood......

More and more immeasurable blood was condensed by Ye Tian, and after the final breakthrough process was over, Ye Tian had already condensed more than thirty drops of immeasurable blood.

This is because his foundation is too strong, so he condensed so much immeasurable blood in one breath when he broke through.

And a high-level immeasurable lifeform like the Void Whale Overlord can barely condense a drop of immeasurable blood, which is already good, and naturally it can't condense dozens of drops of immeasurable blood in one breath like Ye Tian.

With the breakthrough to the third stage, Ye Tian's flesh and blood body was also transforming, becoming more and more powerful, completely breaking the previous shackles and stepping into another level.

And with the breakthrough, Ye Tian's immeasurable will is also increasing, although it is an incidental promotion, but the magnitude of the improvement is not low.

I saw that it didn't take long for Ye Tian's immeasurable will to reach a certain boundary, and it seemed that it was about to transform to another level, but it suddenly came to an abrupt end, and he was only one step away from breaking through completely.

"It seems that my immeasurable will is infinitely close to the level of condensing the lake of immeasurable will!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He felt that it should not be long before he completely condensed the Lake of Infinite Will.

......

The sixth floor of the Ruins Stone Tower.

Not long after Ye Tian went out, he came back again, and at this moment, his copy body had also become a third-stage high-level immeasurable life form.

I saw him walking towards the six hundredth stone steps step by step, completely shocking the other Great Ancestors.

"That Mysterious Great Ancestor of the Outer Realm Alliance has stepped into the third stage so quickly, and the immeasurable will seems to have improved a lot!" said the Star Sea Great Ancestor secretly.

The Ghost Shadow Ancestor also looked at Ye Tian, and he also felt incredible, because at this moment, Ye Tian had already reached the five hundred and ninety stone steps, and he was still walking upward, and he didn't seem to have much pressure.

At this pace, even if you can't walk the 600th stone steps, you should be able to reach the 999th stone steps.

"Could it be that his faction is secretly cultivating him with all its might?"

The Ghost Shadow Ancestor said secretly.

However, these Great Ancestors should not have thought that Ye Tian was relying on himself, not a certain force, let alone a member of the Outside Alliance.

Soon, Ye Tian stood on top of the five hundred and ninety-nine stone steps, and he didn't continue walking, so he knew that he couldn't go up the six hundred stone steps without condensing the Immeasurable Will Lake.

Subsequently, Ye Tian practiced on the five hundred and ninety-ninth stone steps, refining his immeasurable will, and striving to condense the immeasurable will lake.

Originally, Ye Tian was infinitely close to the level of condensing the Infinite Will Lake, and even the total amount of the Infinite Will had exceeded the limit, but due to the insufficient external pressure, he was not able to completely condense the Infinite Will Lake.

But at this moment, the external pressure was enough, so his immeasurable will began to change, and it would not be long before the lake of immeasurable will was condensed.

"It seems that I will condense the Infinite Will's Lake one step ahead of the Star Sea Great Ancestor and the Ghost Shadow Great Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Sure enough.

On this day, Ye Tian's immeasurable will began to transform, and a vortex of immeasurable will was generated in the outside world, which immediately attracted the other great ancestors, and they all looked at it.
